pom.xml.general_idea: Replace hardcoded plugin versions with property placeholders to centralize version management.
Add maven-help-plugin to the plugin management section.
Remove Jacoco agent arguments from Surefire plugin configuration.
Remove Jacoco agent arguments from Failsafe plugin configuration.
Remove jacoco-maven-plugin and its complex execution configurations.
Add nexus-staging-maven-plugin for deployment management.
Update comment to warn about skipping site generation in favor of GitHub Pages.
pom.xml.human_impl: !! WARNING : BY DEFAULT WE SKIP IT TO USE GITHUB-PAGES BRANCH !!

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace jgitflow-maven-plugin with gitflow-maven-plugin for Git Flow management.
Correct typo 'ressource' to 'resource' in shade plugin comment.
Capitalize 'GitHub' in SCM plugin comment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SCM publish plugin configuration to use tryUpdate and remove hardcoded credentials.
Add ignored unused dependencies configuration to maven-dependency-plugin.
Comment out maven-antrun-plugin.
Add maven-enforcer-plugin to plugin management.
Add flatten-maven-plugin for POM flattening during build.
Add maven-war-plugin for Jakarta EE WAR packaging.
Add maven-ejb-plugin for Jakarta EE EJB packaging with version 4.0.
Add maven-ear-plugin for Jakarta EE EAR packaging with version 10.
Add keytool-maven-plugin for generating self-signed certificates.
Reorder reports in maven-project-info-reports-plugin configuration.
Update comment to use lowercase 'website'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a Maven profile to sign artifacts using GPG for secure distribution.
Add a Maven profile to configure deployment to Maven Central via OSSRH and Nexus Staging.
Move GitHub Packages repository and distribution management configuration into a dedicated profile.
Add a Maven profile to build a shaded (fat) JAR using the maven-shade-plugin.
Add a Maven profile to build native executables using GraalVM native-maven-plugin.
Add a Maven profile to create a custom JRE runtime image using jlink and jigsaw-maven-plugin.
Add a Maven profile to aggregate and jar Javadoc documentation.
Add a Maven profile to enable code coverage reporting with JaCoCo for unit and integration tests.
Add a Maven profile to configure SonarQube analysis properties and coverage report paths.
Add a Maven profile to configure Arquillian integration tests with Payara Micro.
Add a Maven profile to configure Arquillian integration tests with a managed Payara Server instance.
Remove static project information blocks (name, description, developers, etc.) likely moved to a parent or managed elsewhere.
Remove static distribution management and repository definitions, replacing them with profile-based configurations.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Refine .dockerignore to explicitly exclude all IntelliJ IDEA project files and directories.
Prevent OS-specific metadata files from being included in the Docker build context.
.dockerignore.human_impl: Added .DS_Store and Thumbs.db to the ignore list.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Exclude Docker configuration files from the build context to avoid recursive or conflicting builds.
.dockerignore.human_impl: Added Dockerfile and .dockerignore to the ignore list.

.dockerignore.general_idea: Exclude Git repository metadata and ignore rules from the Docker build context.
.dockerignore.human_impl: Added .git/ and .gitignore to the ignore list.

.gitignore.general_idea: Replace the project-specific .gitignore with a comprehensive standard Java template to cover various IDEs, build tools, and OS artifacts.
.gitignore.human_impl: Replaced existing entries with a standard list including *.class, *.log, .idea/, .settings/, target/, .DS_Store, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Update the project website URL in the README to reflect a new domain or path structure.

rules.xml.general_idea: Update the XSD schema location URL to the new MoJohaus domain to ensure valid XML validation.
rules.xml.human_impl: Changed xsi:schemaLocation from http://mojo.codehaus.org/... to https://www.mojohaus.org/...

src/site/site.xml.general_idea: Remove the MIT license header comment block from the Maven site descriptor.
